name: Cajun Fettucine
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup 50 count Shrimp, peeled and deveined
Salt and Cracked black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a two-quart heavy-bottom saucepan, melt butter over medium-high heat.
2. Add garlic, green onions, mushrooms, tomatoes, and andouille sausage. Saute for three to five minutes or until all vegetables are wilted.
3. Add shrimp, crabmeat, and crawfish. Cook for an additional ten minutes.
4. Deglaze the pan with white wine and lemon juice, and continue cooking until the volume of liquid is reduced by half.
5. Add heavy whipping cream and, stirring constantly, reduce until the cream reaches a sauce-like consistency, approximately five minutes.
6. Add diced red bell pepper and chipped butter, two to three pats at a time, swirling the pan constantly over the burner. Do not stir with a spoon, as the butter will break down and separate if hot spots develop in the pan.
7. Continue adding butter until all is incorporated. Remove from heat, add parsley, and season to taste using salt and pepper.
8. Gently fold in cooked fettuccine and serve. May be chilled and served as a cold pasta salad.
